description: You are an audio archivist restoring a digitized historical interview tape marred by a severe 60Hz electrical grounding hum. Restore the primary interview audio (/home/ga/Audio/archives/interview_tape.wav) using destructive interference with the isolated hum profile (/home/ga/Audio/archives/hum_isolated.wav). Name the tracks 'Interview' and 'Hum Profile' respectively, and align both at the start of the timeline (00:00:00:00). Invert the polarity of the 'Hum Profile' track to cancel the hum. Create a track group named 'Phase Lock' with Gain sharing enabled for both tracks. Place a session marker named 'Restored Section' at 10.0 seconds. Export the session mix to /home/ga/Audio/restored_export/clean_interview.wav.
